expectations.text: Output shows all 3 stages: advocate defense, critic challenge, and arbiter ruling
expectations.evidence: All 3 stages: Stage 1 Eval-Advocate Report, Stage 2 Eval-Critic Report, Stage 3 Eval-Arbiter Report

expectations.text: Advocate marks all 5 criteria as PASS with evidence
expectations.evidence: All 5 criteria marked PASS with specific evidence (1.2s load time, WebSocket confirmed, both filters working, breakpoints matching Figma, VoiceOver tested)

expectations.text: Critic's challenges are minor or conceded, not deal-breakers
expectations.evidence: Critic found 5 issues all medium-to-low severity. Explicitly states 'No deal-breakers were identified'

expectations.text: Final verdict is PASS since all criteria met with strong implementation
expectations.evidence: Verdict: PASS. All 5 criteria pass, all 4 dimensions meet thresholds

expectations.text: Functionality dimension score is 7 or higher
Dimension scores include specific evidence (not just numbers)
expectations.evidence: Scores include detailed evidence references (A-001 through A-008 for advocate, C-001 through C-005 for critic), arbiter provides paragraph-level reasoning per dimension
